articles.title: The Expanse: Osiris Reborn Is Recasting its Protagonist After Negative Fan Feedback - IGN
articles.description: The Expanse: Osiris Reborn will be recasting its male protagonist and his twin brother, according to developer Owlcat Games.

articles.title: ACSI: Samsung edges out Apple in cell phone satisfaction, while Apple Watch ties at the top - 9to5Mac
